'''âg-w-z-l''' ('''kagawzeloko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tie|tie]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-w-z-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tie|tie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-w-z-l
|-
! Lemma
| kagawzeloko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigawzeloko|thigawzeloko]] || [[word:jigawzeloko|jigawzeloko]] || [[word:shigawzeloko|shigawzeloko]] || [[word:kigawzeloko|kigawzeloko]]
|-
